header: From first edit to a polished page — watch it happen
description:
A short tour of the Desiderio workflow: pick an element from the wizard, edit it inline in the Visual Editor, then switch the theme preset and watch the whole site repaint at runtime.
This is what 'installed before lunch' looks like.

video_file.title: Modern office atrium
video_file.alternative: A modern multi-level office atrium with glass railings and warm light.
video_file.description: Copyright/credit: Photo by Turquo Cabbit on Unsplash. Used as seeded demo imagery.

poster.title: Desiderio frontend in the Lagoon preset
poster.alternative: Rendered Desiderio frontend hero page in the light Lagoon theme preset.
poster.description: Screenshot of a live Desiderio frontend page, used as the video poster.
